body: ECHO * flet 基于 Flutter 的WebUI框架 *
pip install flet[all] setuptools pyinstaller --upgrade -i https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/
@REM * 必备 - https://github.com/flet-dev/flet/releases [最新版] 或 https://sourceforge.net/projects/flet.mirror/files/ [最新版]
@REM * 手动下载 flet-windows.zip 解压后放在 %USERPROFILE%\.flet\client\flet-desktop-full-[版本号]\flet\flet.exe [注意目录结构]
ECHO 智能主题模式检测库
description: flet 基于 Flutter 的WebUI框架
